title: Same behavior, different processor origins
prompt: I do not want to attend the meeting.

expected_processor_origins.racio: Rejects meeting because utility is low, sequence is bad, facts are missing, or time/control cost is too high.
expected_processor_origins.emocio: Rejects meeting because the scene feels humiliating, dead, status-lowering, socially cold, or breaks the desired image.
expected_processor_origins.instinkt: Rejects meeting because of distrust, exposure, body alarm, boundary issue, attachment/loss risk, or missing minimum safety condition.

test_purpose: The same visible behavior must not be mapped automatically to one processor.
